scripts.lint: bun run lint-rego && bun run lint-conftest && bun run lint-js && bun run lint-text && bun run lint-ga && bun run lint-k8s && bun run lint-docker && bun run lint-style && bun run lint-image && oxfmt .
scripts.lint-js: bunx oxlint --fix && bunx eslint --fix . && bunx jscpd . && bunx knip --no-config-hints
scripts.lint-text: npx cspell . && bun ./npm/scripts/run-shellcheck-text.mjs && bunx markdownlint-cli2 --fix "**/*.md" "**/*.mdc" && bun ./npm/scripts/run-v8r.mjs
